title: 30o: blob_lookup bypasses build_request helper
description: Location: crates/jmap-chat/src/methods/blob.rs lines 62-68. blob_lookup manually constructs JmapRequest with hardcoded call-id string r1 and its own using vec, instead of using the shared build_request() helper from methods/mod.rs. Every other method uses build_request(). Why burden: if CALL_ID changes or the using array needs a new entry, blob_lookup silently diverges. Suggested fix: extend build_request() to accept extra capabilities, or add a blob2_build_request() helper, to eliminate the hardcoded r1 duplication.
close_reason: fixed: use super::CALL_ID instead of hardcoded r1
